title: Gig Secure
alt: Gig Secure decentralized freelance platform illustration
description: Developed Gig Secure, a decentralized freelancing platform that implements escrow-based payments, milestone tracking, dispute resolution, and reputation management. Architected the smart contracts as a Finite State Machine (FSM) to enforce valid workflow transitions, guaranteeing transactional integrity, automated settlements, and tamper-proof contract execution.
tech: Blockchain, Decentralized Application, Finite State Machines, Smart Contracts, Ethereum (ERC-20 Tokens Standard), Cryptographic Verification (AES-256 Encryption), Consensus Mechanism, Metamask Wallet Integration, Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), Universal Upgradeable Proxy Standard (UUPS), React, Solidity, IPFS
management: Presentation, Documentation, Project Management, Freelancing Business Case Analysis

title: Extractive Question Answering
description: Fine-tuned BERT and ALBERT with span-labelling heads to build an extractive question answering system that extracts answers as a contiguous span of text from a passage, achieving benchmark-level F1 and Exact Match (EM) performance, validating the effectiveness of transformer-based models for extractive question answering. Applications include customer service, knowledge management, legal and financial information extraction, and public information systems.
tech: Span Labelling, Transfer Learning (Transformer Fine-Tuning), Sliding Windows, Joint Probability Inferencing, BERT, ALBERT, Hyperparameter Tuning

title: Generative AI Training App to Train Nurses in English
alt: Generative AI nurse English training app illustration
description: Developed a Generative AI–powered mobile application to train nurses for Occupational English Test (OET) preparation. It consisted of a RAG-based chatbot to help nurses prepare for the test by comparing their responses to questions with AI-based responses to same questions, improving self-assessment and training efficiency.
tech: Software Engineering, RAG, VectorDB, React Native, Express.js, MongoDB, FastAPI, Microsoft Azure
management: Software Design and Architecture, Project Management, Vendor Management, Software Requirements Specifications, Technical Documentation

title: Children's Quizzing Website For Government of India
description: Designed and built a worldwide automated contacts forecasting system, streamlining, standardizing, and scaling the worldwide Customer Service supply chain demand forecasting. The system, which automated baseline forecasting and demand allocation, enabled Amazon Devices and Digital portfolio expansion into 15+ countries, adding billions in incremental revenue and cutting millions in annual operational costs. Built on Lean principles, the system could seamlessly scale to any number of new devices, geographies, and business units.
tech: ReactJs, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Grafana, Microsoft Azure, software architecture, database design, microservices
management: Scrum, JIRA, Project Management, Client Relations, Software Requirements Specifications

title: Motor and Health Insurance Renewal Backend
alt: Motor and health insurance renewal backend illustration
description: Built a scalable backend system for motor and health insurance renewals for an insurance aggregator, enabling smooth policy renewals, validations, and integrations with external partners.
tech: NestJS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Amazon Web Services, Microservices, RabbitMQ
management: Scrum, JIRA, Project Management, Client Relations, Software Requirements Specifications

title: Operation Theatre Scheduler
alt: Automated hospital operation theatre scheduling system illustration
description: Engineered an automated scheduling system that computes optimal surgeon travel routes and heuristically allocates operation theatre slots, eliminating double-bookings and absorbing minor time delays. Enabled one-click schedule generation and dynamic rescheduling, automatically recalculating slot assignments and theater allocations in response to delays, cancellations, or emergency cases.
tech: Vehicle Routing (TSP-Dijkstra’s Algorithm), Heuristics, Assignment Problem, Geocoding, Python, Data Cleaning, Open Source Routing Machine, Google OR Tools, MongoDB, Django
management: Operational Planning, Stakeholder Management, Project Management, Technical Leadership

title: Financial Insight
alt: Financial Insight AI-powered investment platform illustration
description: Developed Financial Insight, an AI-powered investment platform that combines fundamental analysis with Generative AI insights from annual reports to deliver transparent, explainable stock recommendations. Integrating the elements of fundamental analysis, quantitative finance, and qualitative business insights, the platform helps equity investors evaluate financial health, growth prospects, and future valuation with greater efficiency, efficacy, confidence, and consistency while reducing substantial manual effort.
tech: Fundamental Analysis, Quantitative Finance, Generative AI, Financial Accounting, Statistics, Software Engineering, Information Fusion, Data Engineering, Data Analysis, Data Cleaning, React, FastAPI, Python
management: Software Design and Architecture, Software Requirements Specifications, Technical Documentation, Project Management.

title: Worldwide Capacity Planning
alt: Worldwide capacity planning forecasting system illustration
description: Designed and built a worldwide automated contacts forecasting system, streamlining, standardizing, and scaling the worldwide Customer Service supply chain demand forecasting. The system, which automated demand forecasting and demand allocation, enabled Amazon Devices and Digital portfolio expansion into 15+ countries, adding billions in incremental revenue and cutting millions in annual operational costs. Built on Lean principles, the system could seamlessly scale to virtually any number of new devices, geographies, and business units.
tech: Forecasting, Capacity Planning, Queueing Theory, Stochastic Modelling, Statistics, Amazon Web Services, Exploratory Data Analysis, Data Preprocessing, Data Engineering, Analytical Methods, and Predictive Analytics
management: Stategic Planning, Financial Planning, Operational Planning, Software Design and Architecture, Software Requirements Specifications, Technical Documentation, Stakeholder Management, Project Management, Technical Leadership, and Product Management

title: Apparel Recommendation System
description: Built a hybrid recommendation system combining content-filtering and collaborative-filtering techniques to deliver personalized apparel recommendations, improving relevance, customer engagement, and sales. Incorported recency to prioritize users' recent interactions, enabling the model to adapt to evolving preferences and seasonal shopping trends.
tech: Recommender Systems, Growth Hacking, Revenue Management, Exploratory Data Analysis, Data Preprocessing, Feature Engineering, Content Filtering, Collaborative Filtering, Hierarchical Clustering, CART, Random Forest, Time Weighting, R, SQL
management: Cross Functional Collaboration, Stakeholder Management, Communciation, Technical Leadership

title: Gas Turbine Trip Prediction
alt: Gas turbine trip prediction system illustration
description: Built a predictive analytics model to anticipate valve trip events in gas turbines using machine learning and deep learning, enabling proactive maintenance and reducing unplanned downtime, and thus preventing critical damage to turbines. Engineered time-series features from sensor data, evaluated multiple classification models, and optimized performance through hyperparameter tuning and cross-validation.
tech: Predictive Maintenance, Exploratory Data Analysis, Data Preprocessing, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Data Engineering, Feature Engineering, Information Fusion
management: Cross Functional Collaboration, Stakeholder Management, Communciation

title: Six Sigma Quality Refrigerator Compressor
description: Designed a refrigerator compressor prototype with energy efficiency ratio - cooling capacity per unit power consumption - above industry benchmarks and probabilistic fatigue life of components exceeding 20 years. Since a compressor accounts for about 90% of a refrigerator’s energy consumption, the design was projected to significantly lower the electricity costs for millions of households across North America.
tech: Design For Six Sigma, Statistics, Reliability Engineering, Engineering Design, System Dynamics Modelling, Rig Testing, Computer Simulation, Computer-Aided Design
management: Cross Functional Collaboration, Stakeholder Management, Communciation

title: Capital Asset Portfolio Risk Modelling
description: Fitted marginal distributions of capital asset returns from empirical data and combined them into a joint distribution using a copula-based dependence structure to capture tail co-movement across assets. Ran Monte Carlo simulations on the joint distribution to generate thousands of market scenarios and computed Value at Risk (VaR) and Conditional Value at Risk (CVaR) from the resulting portfolio loss distribution. Further evaluated portfolio resilience under adverse conditions through stress testing, and conducted sensitivity analyses to assess how shifts in asset allocation affected overall risk.
tech: Uncertainity Modelling, Capital Asset Portfolio Risk Management, Statistical Modeling, Monte Carlo Simulation, Stress Testing, Sensitivity Analysis
management: Analytical Thinking, Communciation, Collaborative Problem Solving
